ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level of the patient (code) */,
  "income_level" INTEGER /* Income level of the patient (code) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for each patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex_categories ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_income_level FOREIGN KEY ("income_level") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "diabetes_binary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has diabetes (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "high_bp" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has high blood pressure (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "high_chol" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has high cholesterol (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "chol_check" INTEGER /* Indicates if cholesterol has been checked (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the patient */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is a smoker (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "stroke" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has had a stroke (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "heart_disease_or_attack" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has heart disease or an attack (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "cholesterol_ldl" INTEGER /* LDL cholesterol level */,
  "cholesterol_hdl" INTEGER /* HDL cholesterol level */,
  "glucose_level" REAL /* Blood glucose level */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were measured */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., hospital, home, clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "phys_activity" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient engages in physical activity (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "fruits_consumption" INTEGER /* Indicates the consumption frequency of fruits (0 = Rarely, 1 = Occasionally, 2 = Often) */,
  "veggies_consumption" INTEGER /* Indicates the consumption frequency of vegetables (0 = Rarely, 1 = Occasionally, 2 = Often) */,
  "heavy_alcohol_consumption" INTEGER /* Indicates heavy alcohol consumption (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "physical_activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of physical activity (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet the patient follows (e.g., vegetarian, omnivore) */,
  "alcohol_consumption_type" TEXT /* Type of alcohol consumption (e.g., beer, wine, spirits) */,
  "stress_level" INTEGER /* Stress level on a scale (e.g., 0-10) */,
  "sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Average sleep duration in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "any_healthcare" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has any healthcare coverage (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "no_docbc_cost" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has no cost for doctor visits (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "gen_health" INTEGER /* General health rating of the patient (scale 1-5) */,
  "ment_health" INTEGER /* Mental health rating of the patient (scale 0-30) */,
  "phys_health" INTEGER /* Physical health rating of the patient (scale 0-30) */,
  "diff_walk" INTEGER /* Indicates difficulty in walking (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "medications" TEXT /* List of current medications */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Significant family history of health conditions */,
  "surgical_history" TEXT /* List of previous surgeries */,
  "chronic_conditions" TEXT /* List of chronic conditions */,
  "last_checkup_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health checkup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_categories" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient whose data is accessed */,
  "accessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., clinician, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention recommended (e.g., lifestyle change, medication) */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was recommended */,
  "intervention_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the intervention */,
  "recommended_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recommended the intervention */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_recommended_by FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
